Output:
  const undeliverableAddressLines = undeliverableAddressState
    ? formatAddressLines(undeliverableAddressState.address)
    : [];

  const initialValues = {
    city: existingAddress?.city || '',
    country: 'US',
    email: currentAccount?.email || '',
    line1: existingAddress?.line1 || '',
    line2: existingAddress?.line2 || '',
    phone: currentAccount?.phone || '',
    postalCode: existingAddress?.postalCode || '',
    region: existingAddress?.region || '',
    social: buildSocialProviderItems({
      [SocialProvider.Website]: currentAccount?.url || '',
      [SocialProvider.Twitter]: currentAccount?.twitter || '',
      [SocialProvider.Facebook]: currentAccount?.facebook || '',
      [SocialProvider.Instagram]: currentAccount?.instagram || '',
      [SocialProvider.Rumble]: currentAccount?.rumble || '',
    }),
    softDescriptor: currentAccount?.softDescriptor || '',
  };

  const schema = getSchema(t);

  return (
    <>
      <hgroup>
        <Heading as="h1">{t('heading')}</Heading>
        <Paragraph as="h2">{currentAccount?.displayName}</Paragraph>
      </hgroup>
      <Form initialValues={initialValues} noValidate onSubmit={onSubmit} schema={schema}>
        <Flex direction="column" gap={6}>
          <Panel p={6} variant="primary">
            <Flex direction="column" gap={6}>
              <Paragraph>{t('intro')}</Paragraph>
              <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
                <Label variant="bold">{t('softDescriptor.heading')}</Label>
                <FormInputControl
                  formHelperText={t('softDescriptor.description')}
                  isRequired
                  label={t('softDescriptor.label')}
                  maxLength={16}
                  name="softDescriptor"
                />
              </Flex>
              <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
                <Label variant="bold">{t('contactInformation.heading')}</Label>
                <Box>
                  <Flex gap={2}>
                    <FormMaskedInputControl
                      isRequired
                      label={t('contactInformation.phoneLabel')}
                      name="phone"
                      type="phone"
                    />
                    <FormInputControl
                      isRequired
                      label={t('contactInformation.emailLabel')}
                      name="email"
                      type="email"
                    />
                  </Flex>
                  <Meta>{t('contactInformation.description')}</Meta>
                </Box>
              </Flex>
              <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
                <Label variant="bold">{t('publicAddress.heading')}</Label>
                <FormAddressControl
                  accountSlug={activeAccount?.slug}
                  allowedCountries={['US']}
                  isRequired
                  label={tCommon('street')}
                />
              </Flex>
              <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
                <Label variant="bold">{t('socialProfiles.heading')}</Label>
                <Box>
                  <SocialProfiles />
                </Box>
              </Flex>
            </Flex>
          </Panel>
          <StepFooter
            isLoading={
              updateAccountIsLoading ||
              createAddressIsLoading ||
              updateAddressIsLoading ||
              verifyAddressIsLoading
            }
          />
        </Flex>
      </Form>
      {addressReviewState && (
        <SimpleModal
          heading={t('addressVerification.heading')}
          onClose={() => setAddressReviewState(null)}
        >
          <Paragraph>{t('addressVerification.description')}</Paragraph>
          <Flex direction="column" gap={4} w="full">
            <Box>
              <Label variant="bold">{t('addressVerification.enteredLabel')}</Label>
              {enteredAddressLines.map((line) => (
                <Paragraph as="p" key={`entered-${line.slice(0, 5)}`}>
                  {line}
                </Paragraph>
              ))}
            </Box>
            {suggestedAddressPreview ? (
              <Box>
                <Label variant="bold">{t('addressVerification.suggestedLabel')}</Label>
                {suggestedAddressLines.map((line) => (
                  <Paragraph as="p" key={`suggested-${line.slice(0, 5)}`}>
                    {line}
                  </Paragraph>
                ))}
              </Box>
            ) : null}
          </Flex>
          <SimpleModal.ConfirmationActions
            cancelText={t('addressVerification.keepEntered')}
            confirmText={t('addressVerification.useSuggested')}
            onCancel={handleKeepEnteredAddress}
            onConfirm={handleUseSuggestedAddress}
          />
        </SimpleModal>
      )}
      {undeliverableAddressState && (
        <SimpleModal heading="Address Confirmation" onClose={handleCloseUndeliverableModal}>
          <Paragraph>Are you sure this is the correct address that can receive mail?</Paragraph>
          <Flex direction="column" gap={4} w="full">
            <Box>
              <Label variant="bold">Entered Address</Label>
              {undeliverableAddressLines.map((line) => (
                <Paragraph as="p" key={`undeliverable-${line[0]}`}>
                  {line}
                </Paragraph>
              ))}
            </Box>
          </Flex>
          <SimpleModal.ConfirmationActions
            cancelText="No"
            confirmText="Yes"
            onCancel={handleCloseUndeliverableModal}
            onConfirm={handleConfirmUndeliverableAddress}
          />
        </SimpleModal>
      )}
    </>
  );
}

     city: yup.string().required(),

     postalCode: yup.string().required(),
     region: yup.string().required(),

payload.message:
Added proper email format validation to the Support Profile form using Yup and provided a user-facing validation message.

- Updated `src/pages/OrganizationApplication/SupportProfile/schema.ts` to require emails to match Yup’s `email` format with a localized error string.
- Added `contactInformation.emailInvalid` copy in `src/i18n/locales/en/organizationApplication.json` for the new validation message.

Tests not run (not requested).

content.text:
Added proper email format validation to the Support Profile form using Yup and provided a user-facing validation message.

- Updated `src/pages/OrganizationApplication/SupportProfile/schema.ts` to require emails to match Yup’s `email` format with a localized error string.
- Added `contactInformation.emailInvalid` copy in `src/i18n/locales/en/organizationApplication.json` for the new validation message.

Tests not run (not requested).
